projects.note: Client came back asking to test a 'Billboard Split' treatment; team is actively working execution approach in a live thread (5 replies) as of 7/8, building on the 7/2 approved asset — real back-and-forth continuing.

Client feedback on V1 came in 7/8 (all comments added to EXT per Maria); team is now actively building V2 IR Design/Copy tonight (Asana tasks overdue since 1pm UTC but actively being worked, per Amori/Claire 7/8 evening updates).
Per Asana: V2 delivered 7/7, Client Feedback Due - V2 due today 7/8 — on schedule, not stalled. Team has already scheduled the next round (F1 prep/QC/delivery 7/9-7/10) in anticipation of feedback.
KV Presentation V2 formally sent to customer review 7/7, capping a week of continuous active design work (Figma iterations 7/1-7/7); awaiting response.

New draft delivered 7/3 after real work 6/29-7/3; customer confirmed 7/7 he's happy with the initial setup and reviewing in detail before debriefing Superside. Watch closely — this project has a history of 2.5-month stalls hidden behind similar vague 'awaiting feedback' notes.

Creative Delivery 3 (final copy + designs) sent to customer 7/7 22:54; V3 Delivery task in Asana still shows unchecked (checkbox-hygiene lag) but Slack confirms the real delivery happened same day. Part of a larger 5-week/14-carousel evergreen workstream.

Client gave live feedback on a call 7/8 (recording + notes shared by Bradley); team is now actively actioning the changes with new IR1/IR2/CR milestones set for 7/9-7/13 — momentum shifted from waiting to executing.

projects.note: Assets sent for customer review 6/19; client cited layoffs 6/23 and promised feedback by EOW but never delivered — team confirmed 7/6 still no reply, ~19 days of silence.
Only two messages ever in this channel (4/17 and 6/5), both confirming nothing is actionable pending the customer's brief — no scoping or drafts have occurred.
No real work or client contact since D1 was sent 2026-02-20 (~4.5 months); only activity since is two internal PTO/on-hold announcements, most recently pushing it to mid-late July.
